title: fix: remove L.O.V.E entry and fix DecoyNet URLs
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Pruning the garden
gist.blurb: We did some light weeding in the app showcase, fixing up DecoyNet's links to keep the community garden tidy and easy to navigate.
gist.summary: Cleaned up the community app showcase by fixing broken URLs for DecoyNet and removing an invalid entry.
gist.impact: Users exploring the app showcase will now be directed to the correct repository and live app for DecoyNet.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee doing some light gardening/weeding around a community notice board or signpost. Removing a withered leaf and adjusting a sign pointing to 'DecoyNet'.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny gardener's hat, adjusting a wooden signpost that points to different digital gardens. She is carefully pruning a small withered leaf from the sign. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny gardener's hat, adjusting a wooden signpost that points to different digital gardens. She is carefully pruning a small withered leaf from the sign. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
